sections.paragraph:
Original: כּוּל

Transliteration: kûl

Phonetic: kool

BDB Definition:

  1. to seize, contain, measure
    1. (Qal) to measure, calculate
    2. (Pilpel) to sustain, maintain, contain
      1. to sustain, support, nourish
      2. to contain, hold in, restrain
      3. to support, endure
    3. (Polpal) to be supplied
    4. (Hiphil) to contain, hold, hold in, endure
      1. to contain
      2. to sustain, endure

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 962

Part(s) of speech: Verb
